title: Hanuman Chalisa
intro: A devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Hanuman, recited for strength, courage, devotion and peace of mind.
description:
|| Jai Shri Ram ||
|| Shri Hanuman Chalisa ||
|| Doha ||
Shri Guru charan saroj raj, nij manu mukuru sudhaari.
Baranau Raghuvar bimal jasu, jo daayaku phal chaari.
Buddhiheen tanu jaanike, sumirau Pavan Kumaar.
Bal buddhi vidya dehu mohi, harahu kalesh vikaar.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Hanuman gyaan gun saagar. Jai Kapees tihun lok ujaagar.
Raam doot atulit bal dhaama. Anjani putra Pavansut naama.
meaning: This Chalisa praises Hanuman's strength, devotion, and service to Lord Rama.

faq.q1: When should I recite Hanuman Chalisa?
faq.q2: Can it be recited in any language?
faq.a2: Yes, devotion matters more than language.
